news_items.headline: MLB ALL-STAR GAME 2026, open discussion
news_items.summary: Here’s the AL lineup: Here’s the NL lineup: Let’s go, AL Discuss below:

news_items.headline: MLB All-Star Game Live Discussion as it Happens
news_items.summary: The MLB All-Star Game in Philadelphia will feature 3 St. Louis Cardinals. Jordan Walker, Ivan Herrera and Riley O’Brien are all on the roster. Dylan Cease of the Toronto Blue Jays is the scheduled starter for the American League while Cristopher Sánchez of the Phillies will get the start for the National League. First pitch […]

news_items.headline: All-Star Game 2026, Preview and Discussion
news_items.summary: The American and National League’s best, er, most available square off in Philadelphia on Tuesday. Yes, it’s All-Star week, which means tonight is the All-Star game, which means this is the final MLB-endorsed event until games restart on Friday. For some, especially Mariners fans, that might sound like a blessing. Those fans will be heartened […]

news_items.headline: All-Star Game Thread
2026 MLB All-Star Game: Dylan Cease vs. Cristopher Sánchez
news_items.summary: Ben Rice and Cody Bellinger will start for the American League in the 96th Midsummer Classic.

news_items.headline: Gamethread: MLB All-Star Game, 8:00 p.m. ET
All-Star Game Discussion
news_items.summary: Starting pitcher for the AL is Toronto’s Dylan Cease, the first Blue Jay to do so since 2009, when Roy Halladay did so. On the mound for the NL will be Cristopher Sánchez of the hometown Phillies. Weirdly, the last Phillies pitcher to start the All-Star Game was… Roy Halladay, in 2011. This is the […]

news_items.headline: Contreras unlikely to approve trade out of Boston: 'I found my family here'
Dodgers' Ohtani will be available against Yankees
news_items.summary: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts says Shohei Ohtani will "be in the lineup" for this weekend's series against the Yankees in the Bronx after having fluid drained from his left knee.

news_items.headline: MLBPA rips salary cap ad campaign as 'perverse'
news_items.summary: MLB commissioner Rob Manfred and MLBPA head Bruce Meyer shared differing views on the league's "Level the Field" ad campaign expressing its desire for a salary cap.

news_items.headline: Reports: No. 1 pick Cholowsky gets record bonus
news_items.summary: Roch Cholowsky, the No. 1 pick in the MLB draft, has reportedly agreed to a contract with the White Sox that includes a record-breaking $10.35M signing bonus.

news_items.headline: Signed presidential baseballs top $3M at auction
news_items.summary: A set of 21 presidential autographed baseballs, featuring every president of the United States since Theodore Roosevelt, has sold via Hunt Auctions' MLB All-Star live auction for $3,055,000 during All-Star Week.

news_items.headline: Walker hopes Derby win stirs Black kids to play
news_items.summary: Cardinals outfielder Jordan Walker wants to be a role model, and he hopes his victory in the Home Run Derby inspires more Black kids to play baseball.

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB in LA28 facing hurdles with MLBPA
news_items.summary: Though support is growing for MLB to participate in the Olympics in 2028, it's complicated by disagreements with the MLBPA, according to sources.
